title: Hubtown is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Hubtown is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
